description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in urban casual attire, featuring a flat cap, a button-up shirt with rolled sleeves, a fitted vest, and a pair of jeans secured with a belt. The figure's shirt is tucked in, and the vest is buttoned, giving a neat and slightly vintage appearance. He wears classic lace-up sneakers, adding to the casual, approachable look. The face is clean-shaven, and the hair is mostly covered by the cap, with some hair visible at the sides and back. The hands are relaxed and positioned at the sides, and the overall build is average and proportional. The clothing fits well, with no visible accessories or carried items.
description: An adult male in urban casual attire with a flat cap, button-up shirt, vest, jeans, and sneakers, standing in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat cap, button-up shirt, vest, belt, jeans, and sneakers, with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the cap, the fitted vest, and the straight posture with visible sneaker details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the cap, vest, shirt, and jeans, with the belt and back pockets visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cap's profile, vest, and relaxed arm, with sneaker and jeans details.
attribute_clothing_type: button-up shirt with rolled sleeves, fitted vest, jeans, flat cap, and belt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms relaxed at sides
attribute_hairstyle: short hair mostly covered by cap
